name: create-and-run-agent
description: Create a simple agent with a tool and run it end-to-end
query: Create a simple agent that can search the web and summarize results, then run it.
expected_behavior: Write a Python file with Agent, @tool, and AgentRuntime
Tool function has type hints and docstring
Present the result to the user
success_criteria: Agent writes code to a file, not python3 -c
Tool has type hints and docstring
